creator: mezz@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

The pointyhat[1] and I can't reproduce it. Please follow the '1. When should I 
make a bug report?' part first in our 'Reporting a Bug' page[2]. If none of 
that work, then file another PR or send an email to gnome@FreeBSD.org with the 
FULL DETAIL by follow in the '2. What to report?' in our same bug page. 

[1] http://pointyhat.freebsd.org/errorlogs/i386-6-latest-logs/cairo-1.2.4.log.bz2 
[2] http://www.freebsd.org/gnome/docs/bugging.html
